---
title: "bayes_mixed_eff"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(brms)
library(bayesplot)
library(tidybayes)
library(readr)


dat <- shock_acuity_metrics_copy <- read_csv("shock_acuity_metrics copy.csv")

dat <- dat %>%
  rename(
    id = "Participant",
    cond_name = "Condition",
    cond = "ConditionPercent",
    head_acc = "ProximalHighG2",
    leg_acc = "DistalHighG2",
    gap_size = "VisualAcuityPixels"
  ) 
```

```{r}
fit <- brm(
  formula = gap_size ~ leg_acc + (leg_acc | id),
  data = dat,
  family = gaussian(),
  chains = 4,
  iter = 4000,
  warmup = 1000,
  cores = 4,
  seed = 123
)

summary(fit)


plot(fit)

pp_check(fit)
```

```{r}
posterior <- as_draws_df(fit)
slope_samples <- posterior$b_leg_acc
mean(slope_samples)

plot(density(slope_samples),
     main = "Posterior of slope (leg_acc)",
     xlab = "Slope")


slope_df <- data.frame(slope = slope_samples)

ci <- quantile(slope_samples, c(0.025, 0.975))

ci

ggplot(slope_df, aes(x = slope)) +
  geom_density(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = ci[1], linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = ci[2], linetype = "dotted") +
  labs(
    title = "Posterior Distribution of Slope (leg_acc)",
    x = "Slope",
    y = "Density"
  )
```

```{r}
dat$id <- as.factor(dat$id)

pop_fit <- fitted(
  fit,
  newdata = newdat,
  re_formula = NA,   # population-level only, ignoring participant-specific random effects
  probs = c(0.025, 0.975)
)

pop_df <- cbind(newdat, pop_fit)

grid <- expand.grid(
  leg_acc = seq(min(dat$leg_acc), max(dat$leg_acc), length.out = 100),
  id = unique(dat$id)
)

sub_fit <- fitted(fit, newdata = grid, re_formula = NULL)

grid <- cbind(grid, sub_fit)

```

```{r}
ggplot() +

  # raw data
  geom_point(
    data = dat,
    aes(x = leg_acc, y = gap_size, color = "Observed data"),
    alpha = 0.4, size = 1.6
  ) +

  # subject-specific lines
  geom_line(
    data = grid,
    aes(x = leg_acc, y = Estimate, group = id, color = "Subject fits"),
    alpha = 0.25
  ) +

  # population CI ribbon 
  geom_ribbon(
    data = pop_df,
    aes(x = leg_acc, ymin = Q2.5, ymax = Q97.5),
    fill = "steelblue",
    alpha = 0.2,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +

  # population mean line
  geom_line(
    data = pop_df,
    aes(x = leg_acc, y = Estimate, color = "Population mean"),
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +

  # manual color + legend control
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Legend",
    values = c(
      "Observed data" = "black",
      "Subject fits" = "gray60",
      "Population mean" = "steelblue4"
    )
  ) +

  labs(
    title = "Tibial Acceleration vs Landolt Ring Gap Size",
    x = "Tibial Acceleration (g^2)",
    y = "Landolt Ring Gap Size (Pixels)"
  ) +

  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +

  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```
